extraction.one_line_summary: MICKA Rafael soloed to victory after dropping the breakaway on the Puerto de Mejadas category 1 climb, holding off a chase group by 1:27.
tactical_patterns: RUU Fabio first grand tour breakaway appearance in years signals UAE rotating domestiques into offensive roles late-race.
YATES Adam attacked final kilometers solo from peloton gaining 15 seconds symbolic time over GC group despite earlier struggles.
Jumbo-Visma led peloton chase limiting breakaway gaps despite no direct GC threat showing protective tactics for Roglic's narrow lead.
MICKA sustained solo effort from Puerto de Mejadas summit (20km at 5.4%) demonstrates current climbing form exceeds chase group watts.

rider_signals.MICKA Rafael: positive: subdued celebration suggests he knows form peaked at right moment after previous struggles, undisputed strongest climber today
rider_signals.RUU Fabio: positive: first breakaway in years after stomach issues and retirement consideration shows unexpected late-career resurgence worth reconsidering tactics
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: symbolic late attack recouped 15 seconds but earlier suffering suggests inconsistent form, INEOS leadership still unclear versus Bernal
rider_signals.KRUS Stephen: positive: chased hard from pursuit group shaking head at finish indicates strong watts but not Micka-level, solid climbing form emerging
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: looking really good yesterday and defended position today, commentary suggests he should be INEOS leader going forward over Yates
